name: prompt-evolution
description: Turn prompts dropped by David into proposed workflow/repo changes with approval and feedback logging.

stages.name: intake
stages.description: Identify prompt intent and source context.

stages.name: preference-score
stages.description: Score whether this prompt matches David's current direction.

stages.name: propose-change
stages.description: Compare prompt to registries and propose a patch plan.

llm_gate.prompt: Given the prompt, registries, and repo contracts, propose the smallest safe workflow/repo change. Return plan or review.

stages.name: log-correction
stages.description: Log edits, rejection, or approval as BIL training data.
